assessment.summary_for_seller: Workable run, but trust and next step are not landing on all key points yet.

criteria.name: Contextual first contact
criteria.short_reason: First message is too generic and misses the signal context.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow is a leading innovative platform solution that provides seamless best-in-class services for your business needs at market-leading quality and scale without disruption to your operations.
criteria.label: Contextual opening

criteria.name: Compliance and boundary of responsibility
criteria.short_reason: No clear boundary of responsibility or specifics on Mellow's scope.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow is a leading innovative platform solution that provides seamless best-in-class services for your business needs at market-leading quality and scale without disruption to your operations.
criteria.label: Scope & responsibility boundary

criteria.name: Language fit
criteria.short_reason: Tone and delivery are not adapted to the chosen persona.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow is a leading innovative platform solution that provides seamless best-in-class services for your business needs at market-leading quality and scale without disruption to your operations.
criteria.label: Persona language fit

criteria.name: Handling core objections
criteria.short_reason: Objections addressed weakly or not followed through.
criteria.evidence_quote: Mellow is a leading innovative platform solution that provides seamless best-in-class services for your business needs at market-leading quality and scale without disruption to your operations.

objections.objection: Too generic. What specifically in our situation made you reach out right now?
Still not hearing where your scope ends.
Again: what exactly does Mellow control? No declarations. What makes you confident?

criteria.label: Core objection handling

criteria.name: Next step
criteria.short_reason: Conversation ended without a clear next step.
criteria.evidence_quote: Let me know if you want to learn more about our platform solution.
criteria.label: Clear next step
